subcodes.first_line: The verses have been sent down from One mighty and all-wise; verily they are the Lamp of God amidst all else besides Him. Turn ye unto it with your hearts [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: تنزیل الایات من لدن عزیز حکیم انها لسراج الله بین ما سواه توجهوا الیه بقلوبکم
subcodes.subjects: @chastisement and requital, @duration of the Baha'i cycle; future divine revelations, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @mysteries and their discovery; the mystical vision
